metadata.title: Clariana Silva de Abreu | Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Clariana Silva de Abreu, a Full Stack Developer focused on scalable architecture, React/Next.js and Node.js.

openGraph.title: Clariana Abreu | Full Stack Developer
openGraph.description: Explore the projects and skills of Clariana Abreu in modern web development.

twitter.title: Clariana Silva de Abreu | Full Stack Developer
twitter.description: Portfolio featuring full stack experience, microservices, and modern web products.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am a Lead Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience building high-performance architectures. I currently lead technical initiatives at The Galindo Consulting Group, coordinating distributed teams and end-to-end delivery for international corporate and government clients.
about.paragraph2: My core expertise includes the React/Next.js ecosystem and scalable microservices with Node.js, Python, and Supabase. As a Top-Rated specialist in SaaS and B2B marketplaces, I also apply the discipline I developed in the Brazilian Navy to deliver secure, predictable, and production-ready systems.

technicalSupport.title: Lead Developer - The Galindo Consulting Group
technicalSupport.description: Technical leadership of a specialized team delivering high-impact full stack solutions for corporate and government sectors. Responsible for code reviews, architecture decisions, incident response, and technical-business alignment in international negotiations.

websiteCreation.title: Full Stack Developer - SaaS MVP Specialist (Upwork)
websiteCreation.description: Top-Rated specialist building MVPs for international startups with React, Next.js, Node.js, and Supabase. Delivered Chrome extensions with TypeScript and Shadow DOM, plus UI/UX, SEO, and OpenAI API integrations for AI-first and DeepTech products.

exclusiveCustomizations.title: Computer Network Technician - Brazilian Navy
exclusiveCustomizations.description: Worked on network infrastructure maintenance, physical and virtual server administration, and operational continuity in a high-security environment. This experience strengthened my discipline, precision, and focus on reliability for critical systems.

happyKids.name: Happy-Kids Education Platform
happyKids.description: Educational platform focused on positive psychology, responsive UX, and a Node.js/Express microservice for interactive exercises.

saasBooking.name: AI-Augmented SaaS Booking Platform
saasBooking.description: Full stack scheduling solution built with Next.js, Supabase (RLS), OpenAI API, and Stripe for secure payments.

shoutex.name: AI Chrome Extension (Shoutex)
shoutex.description: Chrome extension (Manifest V3) for real-time SEO analysis with DOM-based logic and a foundation ready for OpenAI integration.

authSystem.name: Authentication System
authSystem.description: Secure authentication architecture using Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Mongoose, and Bcrypt for protected registration and login flows.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Available for Full Stack opportunities and technical leadership roles.
contacts.formDescription: We usually respond in a few hours.
